creator: dch@freebsd.org
text:
many many thanks Uros for his patience on this patch, which was submitted
long before I was even a committer, and migrating the patch from python
to golang in the meantime.

Tested OK on poudriere 13.0-CURRENT amd64, 12.2R amd64
Failed hard on arm64 due to various missing cgo plumbing bits.
If somebody is interested in addressing that I can make the log
and suitable h/w accessible.
